summary: Freight calculation bug fix verified. Backend API /api/calculate-freight working correctly. Frontend auto-freight feature working with pincode-based calculations. Fixed missing SafeAreaView import.

bugs_fixed.issue: SafeAreaView was not imported from react-native

context_for_next_testing_agent: Freight auto-calculation feature is working. When admin opens a pending RFQ with delivery pincode, freight is auto-calculated and displayed in green text. Changing pincode recalculates freight. Admin can also override with custom amount.

tests: Invalid weight (0 or negative) - returns 400 - PASS
Admin opens pending RFQ with delivery pincode - freight auto-calculated - PASS
Admin changes pincode - freight recalculated (387630->400001: Rs.10->Rs.20) - PASS
Admin reverts pincode - freight recalculated (400001->387630: Rs.20->Rs.10) - PASS
Auto-calculated freight shown in green text - PASS
Custom amount input auto-populates with calculated freight - PASS
Review & Approve button opens approval modal - PASS
